_readme: Add the HLS (.m3u8) streams YOU are authorized to use here.
Examples: your own OBS/ffmpeg encoder output, your TV provider's
authenticated stream URL, or a free-to-air broadcaster's stream.
Each entry: id (url-safe), name (shown in the player), url,
The two entries below are public TEST streams so you can verify the

streams.name: Demo: Unified Streaming live test
streams.note: Public live test stream — verifies live relay + prefetch

streams.name: Demo: Mux test stream (VOD)
streams.note: Public test stream — verifies the player
